title: Kitchen Sink Modpack Template Pack
description: A modpack with many basic mods for starting a kitchen-sink modpack. Including world gen, performance, graphical, storage, extra mobs and quality of life mods.
body:
A modpack with lots of vanilla-styled mods for starting a modpack with, including performance, graphical, storage, worldgen, quality of life, mobs, multiplayer, etc. The pack should work as a server as well - it will automatically disable the client-side mods when starting the server. Although it can be enjoyed as a nice pack in its own right, I'm primarily maintaining this as my "go-to" starting template when building/editing my other modpacks. I added some recommended additions or swapouts (See the "Considerations for swapping/adding" panels below). (I, myself, like to rather also add more tech, gun and difficulty mods, for example.) Configs you might want to customise: 1. The "config/aiutd.json" file for the [Am I Up to Date](https://modrinth.com/mod/aiutd) mod is currently configured to point to this specific modpack. They have nice instructions on their mod page on how to set it up for your own pack. 2. [Starter kit](https://modrinth.com/mod/starter-kit). If you add other mods with manuals, try adding them to the Akashic Tome and updating your starter kit with it.
Mods by category ## 🛠️Admin🛠️ Notes, Am I Up To Date, Mods Optimiser, Invincible Loading ## 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦Multiplayer👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 e4mc, Server Sleep, Heartstone (locate an ally), Lootr (instanced loot chests), Emotecraft, What are they up to (Watut), PlayerRevive, Ping Wheel, Daily Dad, Talk Balloons, Pause Server When Empty, Open Parties and Claims & JourneyPAC (shows claims in Journeymap) ## 🌍Exploration🌍 ### World Gen & Ores William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld, Sus Sand & Extra Sus Sand (resource packs), Distant Horizons, Silent's Gems. (Recommended to take a Gem Bag with you when caving/mining), Yeetus Experimentus #### Other Dimensions: ##### Nether Even Better Nether ##### End YUNG's Better End Island, Outer Ends Wilds #### Structures: Structure Credits, Structory_ Towers, Katters Structures (also adds missing villages), Yung's Better Nether Fortresses, YUNG's Better Mineshafts Yung's Better Dungeons, Yung's Better Ocean Monuments, YUNG's Better Strongholds, YUNG's Better Jungle Temples, YUNG's Bridges, YUNG's Better Desert Temples, MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures, MNS - Moog's Nether Structures, MES - Moog's End Structures, MSS - Moog's Soaring Structures, Hopo Better Mineshaft, Hopo Better Ruined Portals Hopo Better Unterwater Ruins, Sparse Structures, Better Archeology, Improved Pillager Outpost, Towers of the Wild Modded, Trek #### Villages / Villagers Chef's Delight, Luki's Grand Capitals, Luki's Crazy Chambers, Luki's Ancient Cities, Sawmill, Villager Death Messages, Villager Names, Trade Cycling, Villagers Regeneration, Not interested! (You can ask wandering traders to leave.), Smarter Farmers (farmers replant), Guard Villagers, End Villager Trader (Katters Structures also adds missing villages) ### Movement/Transport: Waystones, Wall-Jump TXF, Better Climbing, Hang Glider, ReHooked, Too Fast, Personality (sit & crawl), Combat Roll, Block Runner ### Navigation Chalk, JourneyMap, JourneyMap Integration ## 🤠Mobs:🤠 (Villager mobs are listed in the #Villages / Villagers section instead.) Ender Zoology, Luminous_ Monsters, Luminous_ Beasts, Luminous_ Butterflies, Nyf's Spiders, Dismount Entity, No Friendly Fire (Updated), L_Ender's Cataclysm, Happy Ghast Legacy, Living Things, Untitled Duck Mod ## 💼Inventory & Storage💼 ### Gravestone: You're in Grave Danger ### Backpacks: Sophisticated Backpacks, Bag of Holding ### Inventory: Easy Shulker Boxes, TrashSlot, Torch Bandolier, Slot Cycler, Mouse Tweaks, Inventory Mending, Inventory Tweaks_ ReFoxed, Item Borders, Inventory Totem, Akashic Tome ### Storage: Tom's Simple Storage Mod, Echo Chest, ClickThrough Plus, Storage Labels, Sophisticated Storage ## 🤺Armory🤺 ### Multiple Armory Categories: Silent Gear, Crystal Tools ### Tools/Equipment: Liteminer (Vein Mining), GravelMiner, Torch Toss, Artifacts, Mob Lassos, Jake's Build Tools, Magnum Torch ### Combat: MmmMmmMmmMmm (Target dummy to test weapons on), Better Combat, Passive Shield, More Vanilla Shields! ### Armors: Armor of the ages, Immersive Armors, Armor Statues, Armor Stand Shift Swap ## 🚧Building🚧 Chipped, Rechiseled, Rechiseled_ Chipped, Freecam, Pro Placer, Healing Campfire, Laser Bridges & Doors, Double Doors, Bridging Mod, Sooty Chimneys, Additional Placements, Build Guide, Macaw's Doors, Macaw's Fences and Walls, Macaw's Bridges, Macaw's Windows, Macaw's Paths and Pavings, Macaw's Roofs, Macaw's Trapdoors, Macaw's Stairs, NeonDeco, Mo Glass ### Furniture Paladin's Furniture Mod, Cooking for Blockheads, ModernDeco, Macaw's Lights and Lamps ### Tech: Supplementaries, Amendments, Forgematica (Schematics) ### Farming & Food: AppleSkin, Ender Tendril, Berries and More, Farmer's Delight, Universal Bone Meal, Leaves Be Gone, RightClickHarvest ## ✨Effects✨ ### Camera: Better Third Person, WI Zoom ### Sound: Sounds & More Sounds, Raise Sound Limit Simplified, AmbientSounds, Boss Music Mod_Datapack, Sound Physics Remastered, Now Playing, Cake Chomps, Ding ### Nature: Cool Rain, Rainbows, Pretty Rain, Coastal Waves, Falling Leaves (NeoForge_Forge), 3D Crops Revamped (Resource Pack), Allure Micropacks _ 3D Plants (Resource Pack), Wakes Reforged, Particular Reforged ### Models / Animations: playerAnimator, Fresh Moves (Resource Pack), Not Enough Animations, Wavey Capes, 3D Skin Layers, Better Animations Collection, ItemPhysics Lite, Canoe Boats (Resource Pack), Vintage Animations, Golem Spawn Animation, Wither Spawn Animation ### Visual: Excluding Models / Animations, of course. Explosive Enhancement_ Reforged, Subtle Effects, Perception, Visuality_ Reforged, Nautilus 3D (Resource Pack), ByeByeSky (Resource Pack - Prevents double sun & moon with shaders.), Beautiful Enchanted Books (MOD EDITION), Particle Interactions, Elytra Contrails, YDM's Weapon Master, Adorable Eggs #### Shaders: Sodium and Iris Shaders, Complementary Shaders - Reimagined (set as default), ## 🪟GUI Changes🪟 ### Chat Chat Heads, Beautified Chat (Client) ### Tooltips: Item Descriptions & Mod Descriptions (Resource pack), Enchantment Descriptions, Enchantment Level Cap Indicator, Effect Descriptions ### Crafting/Recipes: Crafting Tweaks, Just Enough Items (JEI), Just Enough Resources (JER) and Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED), Easy Anvils, Just Enough Archaeology, Easy Magic, Crafting on a Stick, Advanced Loot Info ### HUD: Jade & Jade Addons (Neo_Forge), Pick up notifier, Traveler's Titles, Paper Doll, Overflowing Bars, Counter, Effect Timer Plus, Improved Sign Editing, Armor Durability HUD ### Menus: BetterF3, Controlling, KeyBind Bundles, Satisfying Buttons, Resourcify, Cherished Worlds, Better Advancements, Search Stats, Icons & Icons Advertisement Removal (Resource Packs), Reese's Sodium Options, Draggable Lists ## 👌Performance & Stability:👌 Observable & spark (For server performance troubleshooting), Noisium, BadOptimizations, Packet Fixer, Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks, Sodium Extra, Chloride (Embeddium++_Sodium++) (does leaf & entity culling, language reload, bed & chest model optimising, Borderless Fullscreen & JEI hiding until search entered), Clumps, Fast Paintings, Default Options, Fast Item Frames, ScalableLux, Lithium, ImmediatelyFast, Crash Assistant, Dynamic FPS, Cubes Without Borders, Model Gap Fix, Neruina - Ticking Entity Fixer, Dimensional Threading Reforked, ModernFix, FerriteCore ## 🤷‍♂️Other Dependancies:🤷‍♂️ ETF Entity Texture Features, EMF Entity Model Features, Patchouli, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL), Raise Sound Limit Simplified (Recommended by Sounds)
Considerations for swapping **NB:** When introducing new client-side mods, consider updating the Mods Optimiser config accordingly, if not already catered for. ### World Gen & Ores Biomes O' Plenty can replace: - Terralith or William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld (for Overworld), - Incendium, Even Better Nether or ReNether (for Nether) - Outer Ends Wilds or Nullscape and End's Phantasm (incompat with Yung's End Island, though) (For End) (The Macaw's Biomes O' Plenty and TerraBlender mods should be with Biomes O' Plenty as well.) ### Movement Personality, Wall-Jump TXF and Combat Roll can be swapped out for ParCool or Moves Like Mafuyu
Considerations for adding **NB:** When introducing new client-side mods, consider updating the Mods Optimiser config accordingly, if not already catered for. ### Multiplayer Better Death Messages (Resource pack), WorldComment ### Dimension mods The Aether, Twilight Forest, The Bumblezone - NeoForge/Forge ### Structures Valarian Conquest, When Dungeons Arise ### Villages / Villagers Underground Village, Stoneholm ### Tech mods Create (When adding Create, also consider adding Create_ Structures Arise|Create: Structures Arise), Mekanism, Immersive Engineering, SecurityCraft ### Movement/Transport Rustic Engineer, Immersive Machinery, Small Ships ### Navigation MapFrontiers ### Mobs (more difficulty) THE UNDEAD REVAMPED, Rotten Creatures, Undead Armies, Gamingbarn's Zombies, Mutants and Zombies ### Inventory & Storage Carry On (Might encounter some issues with Sophisticated Storage mods, though), Chestpack Backpacks (Cannot pick up Sophisticated Storage chests/barrels), Chested Companions (chests on your pets), Starter Kit (To customise starting items) ### Weapons Vic's Point Blank (guns), Superb Warfare (guns, tanks, choppers, turrets), Xtra Arrows, Too Many Bows ### Building Dawn of Time, Shroome's Buildtacular, Construction Sticks, Dirt Deco, TrafficCraft ### Farming & Food Ambulance Lite / Ambulance, AgriTech - Automated Crops, AgriTech Trees - Automated Trees ### Resource packs ByeByeSky (included in pack, but deactivated by default) will remove the vanilla sun & moon if your shader pack causes a duplicate sun/moon issue.

Key Rebinds Key Bundles: (I've set original keys to empty for these, so only the key bundle has the keybind.) - B-Key: 1. Crystal Tools: Open Backpack 2. JourneyMap: Create Waypoint 3. Sophisticated Backpack: Open Backpack 4. Tom's Simple Storage: Open Terminal - N-Key: 1. Notes: Open Notes - Z-Key: 1. Emotecraft: Open Emote Wheel 2. L_Ender's Cataclysm: Cataclysm Chestplate Ability Armor Durability HUD: - key.keyboard.N = empty (default "n") Armor Stand Shift Swap: - Swap armor set = . (default empty) Build Guide: - Open Build Guide = F12 (default "b") Combat roll: - Roll: Mouse 5 Crafting on a stick: - Open Crafting on a Stick = < (default "V") Curios: - Open/Close Curios Inventory = empty (default "g") Emotecraft: - Open Emote Wheel = empty (default "b") (added to Keybundle "Z-Key") Iris: - Reload Shaders = empty (default "r") JourneyMap: - Create Waypoint (at Cursor) = empty - Toggle Entity Names = empty (default "g") - Waypoint Manager = empty (default "n") L_Ender's Cataclysm: - Cataclysm Ability = x (default) Personality: - Crawl = Caps Lock Ping Wheel: - Ping Location: Mouse 4 Rehooked: - Fire Hook: G (default "c") - Retract Hook: Shift + G (default "Shift + c") Slot Cycling: - Cycle Hotbar Slot Left = empty (default "g") - Cycle Hotbar Slot Right = empty (default "h") WI Zoom: - Zoom: C (default "V") YDM's Weapon Master: - Open Settings = empty (default "v")
Other Credits: Maintenance icons created by Andrean Prabowo - Flaticon
